projectDescription: A CLI tool that generates safe example.env files from your .env files by redacting secrets and masking sensitive values.
keyFeatures: Recursively discovers all .env files in a project directory
Redacts secret values using the !SECRET inline comment directive
Masks entire regions of variables with !MASK-ON / !MASK-OFF block directives
Preserves whitespace, comments, and non-secret variable values
Generates placeholder values in the format <YOUR_VAR_NAME>
Supports a --mask-all flag to redact every variable value
Works with uv for zero-config installation and execution
